name: Generate a basic descriptive cohort using SynPUF Subset Descriptive cohort sanity: cohort_subset_cohort.yaml
description:
In the staging environments for Cocoa, SynPUF Tiny will be deployed in the
controle plane's AWS account, like they have been historically.
This test is a regression check to make sure that we can execute a basic dispatcher job
in a CoCoA environment with the dataset hosted in the control plane.
descriptionHtml:
In the staging environments for Cocoa, SynPUF Tiny will be deployed in the
controle plane's AWS account, like they have been historically.
This test is a regression check to make sure that we can execute a basic dispatcher job
in a CoCoA environment with the dataset hosted in the control plane.

testStage.description:
In the staging environments for Cocoa, SynPUF Tiny will be deployed in the
controle plane's AWS account, like they have been historically.
This test is a regression check to make sure that we can execute a basic dispatcher job
in a CoCoA environment with the dataset hosted in the control plane.

labels.name: story
labels.value: Dispatcher - Run basic descriptive cohort jobs as a sanity check in CoCoA environment if it's enabled.

labels.name: story
labels.value: A descriptive cohort should be able to be generated using SynPUF Subset.
